summary: Completed full regression testing after 40+ file changes. CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Pending commissions now match between TradesPage (Contracts) and CommissionsPage (Brokerage Invoices) - both use trade.invoicePaid field as source of truth. BEK446 is the only pending commission and appears correctly in both pages. All 34/35 backend API tests passed (1 minor failure: /api/market/news endpoint doesn't exist). All UI pages load and function correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - may not exist or have different path

passed_tests: BUG FIX: TradesPage 'Awaiting Brokerage Payment' section shows BEK446 (status=completed, invoicePaid=false)
BUG FIX: CommissionsPage 'Pending USD' section shows BEK446 with PENDING status
BUG FIX: Both pages now use trade.invoicePaid field as source of truth - MATCHING
Login flow: Admin (salih.karagoz/salih123) works correctly
Login flow: Accountant (pir.accounts/pir123) works correctly
Global search: Searches contracts (BEK446 found with details)
Global search: Searches partners (Mediterra shows 10 contracts)
Global search: Searches vessels (MV ARIYA shows contract and vessel)
Contracts page: Shows Ongoing (3), Pending (0), Completed (1), Awaiting Brokerage (1)
Vessel Execution page: Shows Awaiting Brokerage Payment (3), Completed (10) with filters
Vessel Execution filters: Commodity, Seller, Buyer, Origin, Vessel all present
Market Data page: All 5 tabs load (Indications, CBOT & Exchange Rates, Turkish Exchanges, Tenders, Coaster Freights)
Accounting page: Loads with Incoming (11), Outgoing (2), Bank Statements tabs
Accounting RBAC: Admin can access all tabs
Accounting RBAC: Accountant can read vendors and bank-accounts (verified via API)
Accounting RBAC: Accountant cannot create vendors (403 returned)
Partners page: Shows 97 counterparties with Sellers/Buyers/Co-Brokers tabs
Calendar page: Shows March 2026 with events (Ramazan Bayramı, conferences)
Port Line-Ups page: Daily and Monthly tabs with vessel data
New Contract page: Form renders with all fields (Contract Details, Parties, Commodity)
Year filter on TradesPage includes older completed trades with unpaid brokerage
Backend API: GET /api/trades returns 14 trades
Backend API: GET /api/trades/{id} returns trade details
Backend API: PATCH /api/trades/{id}/status works
Backend API: GET /api/partners returns partners list
Backend API: GET /api/vessels returns vessels list
Backend API: GET /api/commodities returns commodities
Backend API: GET /api/ports returns ports
Backend API: GET /api/surveyors returns surveyors
Backend API: GET /api/origins returns origins
Backend API: GET /api/market/prices returns prices
Backend API: GET /api/market/tenders returns tenders
Backend API: GET /api/vendors returns vendors
Backend API: GET /api/bank-accounts returns bank accounts
Backend API: GET /api/bank-statements returns statements
Backend API: GET /api/events returns events
Backend API: GET /api/port-lineups/dates returns dates
Backend API: GET /api/port-lineups/summary returns summary
Backend API: GET /api/invoices returns invoices
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: TradesPage lines 190-196 now use trade.invoicePaid field to determine pending commissions, matching CommissionsPage line 73
Year filter logic (lines 106-124) correctly includes older completed trades with unpaid brokerage when viewing current year

VesselExecutionPage uses status='brokerage' for its 'Awaiting Brokerage Payment' section - this is different from TradesPage which uses invoicePaid=false for completed trades. Both are valid for their respective purposes.
Global search implementation in AppLayout.js works correctly with Turkish character normalization
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. BEK446 is the only trade with invoicePaid=false
context_for_next_testing_agent: The critical bug fix has been verified: pending commissions now match between TradesPage and CommissionsPage. BEK446 (Barley, Bek Tarim → Mediterra Agro, MV DRY VOYAGER 1) is the only pending commission with invoicePaid=false. The VesselExecutionPage shows 'Awaiting Brokerage Payment' based on status='brokerage' which is different from the TradesPage logic - this is intentional. All 14 trades exist in the database. MW1002, PIR-26-AZ8304, RC190126 have status='brokerage' but invoicePaid=True (already paid). The /api/market/news endpoint doesn't exist - Indications tab uses a different mechanism.

bugs_fixed.bug: Pending commissions mismatch between TradesPage and CommissionsPage
bugs_fixed.fix: Both pages now use trade.invoicePaid field as source of truth
bugs_fixed.verification: BEK446 appears in both 'Awaiting Brokerage Payment' (TradesPage) and 'Pending USD' (CommissionsPage)
